title: Michigan vs Arizona 2026 Final Four Preview: Expert Picks, Odds, and Start Time
body:
As the 2026 NCAA Tournament reaches its penultimate stage, the stage is set for a thrilling showdown in the Final Four. The Michigan Wolverines will take on the Arizona Wildcats in a highly anticipated matchup that promises to deliver high-flying basketball, clutch performances, and heart-stopping moments. Scheduled to tip off at 8:49 p.m. ET on Saturday, April 4, live on TBS, this game is shaping up to be one for the ages.

For Michigan, this game represents an opportunity to make a deep run in the tournament and etch their names in the history books. Led by their star-studded roster, the Wolverines have been on a tear all season, displaying a potent offense and stifling defense that has left opponents scrambling to keep up. Their path to the Final Four has been nothing short of remarkable, with several comeback victories that have showcased their mental toughness and resilience.

On the other side of the court, Arizona is looking to make a statement and prove themselves as one of the top teams in the country. Led by their high-flying offense and tenacious defense, the Wildcats have been a force to be reckoned with all season, dispatching opponents with ease and authority. Their Final Four appearance marks a significant milestone for the program, and they will be determined to make the most of it.

One of the key factors that will decide the outcome of this game is the performance of each team's star players. For Michigan, that means Jalen Duren and Eli Brooks, who have been instrumental in leading the team to their current success. Meanwhile, Arizona's Bennedict Mathurin and Christian Koloko will look to make a similar impact, using their size, speed, and agility to outmaneuver the Wolverines' defenders. Whoever comes out on top in this battle of stars will likely have the upper hand in the game.

As the stage is set for this epic showdown, fans around the country are eagerly anticipating the matchup. The energy in the arena, combined with the high stakes of the game, promises to create an electric atmosphere that will only add to the excitement. With so much on the line, it's anyone's game – and that's what makes this Final Four matchup so compelling.

As the two teams take to the court on Saturday, April 4, one thing is clear: this game will be a true test of strength, skill, and determination. Will Michigan's experience and tenacity prove too much for Arizona, or will the Wildcats' speed and agility catch the Wolverines off guard? Only time will tell, but one thing is certain – this game will be one for the ages, and fans will be on the edge of their seats until the final buzzer sounds.
